block_00: Find entry points and reversals with the Envelopes indicator
block_01: Being a great alternative to Bollinger Bands, this indicator plots three Moving Averages around the price chart in order to follow the trend and indicate the overbought and oversold levels.
block_02: You may set up the indicator in accordance to the volatility of the asset, or use the default settings. This indicator is widely used for finding entries, as well as potential price reversals, which makes it a useful tool on its own and combined with other indicators.
block_03: Check the full article to learn how to use the Envelopes indicator in your daily trading.
